onboarding.welcome: 👋 Welcome to MamaBot, {{name}}! I'll help you track your pregnancy.
onboarding.ask_lmp: 📅 Enter the first day of your last menstrual period in YYYY-MM-DD format:
onboarding.invalid_date: ❌ Invalid date format. Please enter the date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
onboarding.date_in_future: ❌ Date cannot be in the future. Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.week_calculated: 🤰 You are {{week}} weeks pregnant! Estimated due date: {{edc}}.

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.reset_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure? All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

error.unknown_callback: ❌ Unknown command. Please use the menu.
error.generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
